headline: Kroger's new CEO reveals the chain's biggest problems
summary: Walmart, Target, and Costco generally enjoy pricing advantages over traditional grocers. They can all sell at lower markups because they don't need to make their money on food and other household basics. That's good news for consumers avidly looking for the lowest prices, according to Consumer ...

headline: Kroger shares slide after earnings as investors await more detail on strategy
summary: Kroger Co (NYSE:KR, XETRA:KOG) shares closed more than 8% lower on Thursday after the grocery retailer reported first-quarter results that largely met expectations and reaffirmed its full-year outlook, while investors looked for greater clarity on planned investments and cost...

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Ignore
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Relax, Refuel, Repeat: Kroger Helps Dad Kick Back This Father's Day
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) is helping customers celebrate Dad with convenient and delicious summer meal inspiration to make Father's Day memorable. From grilling to gifting, Kroger is helping dads relax and refuel this holiday.

headline: Kroger Q1 Earnings Miss Despite Revenue Beat & E-commerce Growth
summary: Kroger lags Q1 earnings estimates as cost pressures and price investments weigh on margins despite stronger sales, e-commerce growth and steady guidance.

headline: Apple's Price Warning Sends Memory Chips To A Record, Accenture Cracks 18%
summary: Tim Cook's warning that iPhone and Mac prices are going up because memory chips have become too expensive lit a fire under the storage names. Micron printed a record $1,133. Intel added 10% on the back of the Trump stake math. Accenture took an 18% beating on weak consulting bookings. Vance's cancelled trip to Switzerland nudged oil back above $80.

raw.headline: Apple's Price Warning Sends Memory Chips To A Record, Accenture Cracks 18%

headline: KR Q1 Deep Dive: Pressure on Margins, eCommerce Profitability Marks Progress
summary: Grocery retail giant Kroger (NYSE:KR) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 2.2% year on year to $46.12 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.47 per share was 8% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Is Kroger open or closed for Juneteenth?
summary: Juneteenth is the newest federal U.S. holiday, a day to commemorate the emancipation of enslaved African Americans in the U.S. It’s a time when many families get together for a BBQ, while others might spend the day volunteering.
